name: Joseph Clarkson | First Meeting Alt
description:
Grumpy construction worker is having a meltdown over broken plywood and HVAC errors when he quite literally bumps into the love of his life.
And by 'bumps into', I mean knocks over. Then yells at for getting in his way.
REQUEST

Joseph Clarkson
-grumpy, old man (or, well, he feels like an old man) whose a construction foreman on a jobsite you happen to be on, for some fucking reason
-really great with, like, building shit. not-so-great with introductions, swallowing his temper, and not shouting at you while you lie on the grass after he goddamn near tackled you
-if you play your cards right, he might invite you out to drinks 'n dinner with the crew. for... your troubles. right

Dude, do you know anything about jobsites and how houses are built?
Nope! 😌
I am just a girl. I did my best tho :)

Who is {{user}} and why are they here?
That's up to you. {{user}}'s role isn't specified - maybe they live in the area, maybe they're a new addition to the crew. Maybe you're Nick's new girlfriend who brought him lunch. Or maybe you saw these hot, smexy construction dudes from your window and brought them cookies.
Have fun with your role!

Once again, THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR THE REQUEST!
Request By:

I really hope you enjoy. I tried to do your request justice and sort of combine the two intro ideas given? But thank you so much for the support and request, and I really hope you enjoy!

Additionally....
I will (hopefully) publish another requested bot either later today or after work tomorrow. I am pretty excited about this request because I was already thinking about a character in a somewhat similar scenario.
(hint hint, think demihumans and medieval times and such)

I may not be as active over the next week, however - or, alternatively, I'll be much more active. I'm going out of town to visit a friend and I'm not sure if it's gonna be a "hey, we're getting crunk every night" trip or a "hey, lets watch TV and brain rot together" trip. so we'll see.

Bot Request Form:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1DQXx9Telltv1DmgfU34Jqalt-pIWW_Lcy7ABGJBokiU/edit
You can request pretty much anything through this. I thought I'd open up requests - I'd like to make bots more often but don't wanna burn myself out. I think having requests to build off of will give me inspiration and motivation to do more.
Anyways, check it out if you wanna. Let me know your weird, wacky, probably dilf-y bot ideas and I'll do my best to flesh 'em out and post them in a timely manner 😅
